creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
Upon start with,

sftpgo serve

It seems a few new templates are missing:

ERR error loading required template: open /usr/local/share/sftpgo/templates/email/password-expiration.html: no such file or directory


ERR error loading required template: open /usr/local/share/sftpgo/templates/webadmin/iplists.html: no such file or directory

and possibly more.
